title.ko: 기계 또는 기관의 윤활 일반; 내연기관의 윤활; 크랭크실의 환기
title.en: LUBRICATING OF MACHINES OR ENGINES IN GENERAL; LUBRICATING INTERNAL-COMBUSTION ENGINES; CRANKCASE VENTILATING

definition.ko: 강제윤활 F01M1/00 특수한 윤활 F01M3/00, F01M7/00, F01M9/00 윤활제의 조정 F01M5/00 부품, 부속품 F01M11/00 크랭크실의 환기 F01M13/00

title.en: Pressure lubrication
using lubricating pumps
using pressure in working cylinder or crankcase to operate lubricant-feeding devices
Lubricating systems characterised by the provision therein of crankshafts or connecting-rods with lubricant passageways, e.g. bores
Lubricating systems characterised by the provision therein of lubricant-jetting means

title.ko: 윤활제 환기 혹은 청정장치, 예. 필터, 를 내장함 으로써 특징 지워진 윤활방식(윤활제 청정장치의 부착, 연결 또는 구조상의 세부 F01M 11/03)
title.en: Lubricating systems characterised by the provision therein of lubricant venting or purifying means, e.g. of filters (mounting of, connecting of, or constructional details of lubricant purifying means F01M0011030000)

title.ko: 그룹 1/02에서 1/10으로 분류되지 않은 폐순환 closed-circuit) 윤활방식
title.en: Closed-circuit lubricating systems not provided for in groups F01M0001020000-F01M0001100000
Timed lubrication (F01M0001080000 takes precedence)
Controlling lubricant pressure or quantity

title.ko: 지시 또는 안전장치(윤활제 레벨에 관한 것 F01M 11/06, 11/12)
title.en: Indicating or safety devices (concerning lubricant level F01M0011060000, F01M0011120000)
concerning lubricant pressure
rendering machines or engines inoperative or idling on pressure failure
acting on engine fuel system
acting on engine ignition system
acting on engine combustion-air supply

title.ko: 특히 연료공기 혼합물을 크랭크 케이스에서 압축하는 기관 또는 윤활제가 연료, 연소용 공기 혹은 연료공기 혼합물에 포함되어 있는 그 외의 기관에 적용되는 윤활(실린더내로 흡입되기 전에 공기 또는 연료공기 혼합물로부터 윤활제를 분리하는 것 F01M 11/08)
title.en: Lubrication specially adapted for engines with crankcase compression of fuel-air mixture, or for other engines in which lubricant is contained in fuel, combustion air, or fuel-air mixture (separating lubricant from air or fuel-air mixture before entry into cylinder F01M0011080000)
with variable proportion of lubricant to fuel, lubricant to air, or lubricant to fuel-air mixture
for upper cylinder lubrication only

title.ko: 윤활제의 가열, 냉각, 온도조절(기관냉각계통 내에서의 윤활제 냉각기 배열 F01P 11/08) 기관의 시동을 촉진하는 윤활장치
title.en: Heating, cooling, or controlling temperature of lubricant (arrangement of lubricant coolers in engine cooling system F01P0011080000); Lubrication means facilitating engine starting
Conditioning lubricant for aiding engine starting, e.g. heating
Diluting, e.g. with fuel
Lubrication means specially adapted for machine or engine running-in

title.ko: 그룹 F01M 1/00-F01M 7/00에서 분류되지 않는, 또는 별도로 하여 관련된 적절한 특징을 가진 윤활장치
title.en: Lubrication means having pertinent characteristics not provided for in, or of interest apart from, groups F01M0001000000-F01M0007000000
having means for introducing additives to lubricant
Use of fuel as lubricant
Dip or splash lubrication
Drip lubrication
Lubrication of valve gear or auxiliaries
Non-pressurised lubrication, or non-closed-circuit lubrication, not otherwise provided for

title.ko: 그룹 F01M 1/00-F01M 9/00에서 분류되지 않는, 또는 별도로 하여 관련된 부품, 세부 또는 부속품
title.en: Component parts, details, or accessories, not provided for in, or of interest apart from, groups F01M0001000000-F01M0009000000
Arrangements of lubricant conduits
Mounting or connecting of lubricant purifying means relative to the machine or engine; Details of lubricant purifying means
Filling or draining lubricant of or from machines or engines
Means for keeping lubricant level constant or for accommodating movement or position of machines or engines
Separating lubricant from air or fuel-air mixture before entry into cylinder
Indicating devices; Other safety devices
concerning lubricant level
Crankcase ventilating or breathing
by means of additional source of positive or negative pressure
having means for purifying air before leaving crankcase, e.g. removing oil
specially adapted for submersible engines, e.g. of armoured vehicles
